# Requirements Archive: FlawChess — v1.29 Live-Engine Analysis Page

**Status:** ✅ SHIPPED 2026-06-29 — all 17 v1 requirements complete
**Defined:** 2026-06-26
**Source:** SEED-066 (distilled from a 2026-06-25 `/gsd-explore` session; locked decisions D-1..D-5). Domain research in `.planning/research/`.

**Core Value:** Position-precise WDL across openings + endgames + time pressure on top of users' actual chess.com / lichess games, with personalized LLM commentary and an auto-generated opening-strengths/weaknesses report. v1.29 extends this with a free-play analysis surface so users can explore any position with a live engine without leaving FlawChess.

## v1 Requirements — all Complete

Almost entirely frontend; no backend schema or new endpoints (D-4).

### Live Engine (ENGINE)

- [x] **ENGINE-01**: Live evaluation (eval bar + numeric centipawn/mate) of the current position, computed in-browser by single-thread WASM Stockfish
- [x] **ENGINE-02**: Top 1–2 candidate lines (MultiPV) as clickable SAN sequences with a depth indicator
- [x] **ENGINE-03**: Best move rendered as an arrow on the board
- [x] **ENGINE-04**: Toggle the engine on/off with a visible "loading engine" / "analyzing" state; board + stepper stay interactive while WASM initializes
- [x] **ENGINE-05**: Auto re-analysis (debounced) on position change, bounded by a movetime/node cap

### Analysis Board (BOARD)

- [x] **BOARD-01**: Any legal move from any position; a mid-line move forks a variation rather than being rejected
- [x] **BOARD-02**: Navigate the move tree (back/forward, jump, reset) and flip the board
- [x] **BOARD-03**: Move input by drag-drop and click-to-click (touch)
- [x] **BOARD-04**: Board/variation state encoded in the URL (shareable/bookmarkable, no server-side persistence)
- [x] **BOARD-05**: Clickable move list showing main line + the single active variation (flat — full nested-tree deferred to v2)

### Route & Entry Points (ROUTE)

- [x] **ROUTE-01**: Standalone `/analysis` page, lazy-loaded so the engine bundle is fetched only on this route
- [x] **ROUTE-02**: Open the board pre-loaded from a tactic card, a game-review ply, and an opening position

### Tactic Mode (TACTIC)

- [x] **TACTIC-01**: Board opens at the flaw position with the stored PV as initial mainline (D-5); live engine takes over on deviation
- [x] **TACTIC-02**: Motif badge, missed/allowed framing, depth-to-punchline counter, next/prev-tactic rail — every Phase 135 behavior preserved
- [x] **TACTIC-03**: Standalone Tactic Line Explorer retired (regression-gated); all entry points repointed to `/analysis`

### Platform Hardening (PLAT)

- [x] **PLAT-01**: Single-thread WASM, no site-wide COOP/COEP headers (OAuth + iOS Safari unaffected); absence CI-guarded
- [x] **PLAT-02**: Engine WASM/NNUE loads efficiently on mobile (lite ~7 MB, iOS Cache-API-safe, PWA `*.wasm` handling verified); pauses when tab hidden

## Deferred to v2

- **BOARD-V2-01**: Paste-a-FEN / paste-PGN entry box
- **BOARD-V2-02**: Full nested variation-tree display
- **BOARD-V2-03**: Promote / demote / delete variation
- **ENGINE-V2-01**: Multi-thread WASM as a desktop-only progressive enhancement on a hard-loaded, cross-origin-isolated `/analysis` document (D-3)

## Traceability (final)

| Requirement | Phase | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| ENGINE-01..05 | Phase 136 | Complete |
| PLAT-01, PLAT-02 | Phase 136 | Complete |
| BOARD-01..05 | Phase 137 | Complete |
| ROUTE-01, ROUTE-02 | Phase 138 | Complete |
| TACTIC-01..03 | Phase 139 | Complete |

**Coverage:** 17/17 v1 requirements mapped and complete (100%). Phase 140 (Full-Game Analysis Board) extended the shipped surface per `.planning/notes/analysis-board-fullgame-refinement.md` without adding new v1 requirement IDs.
